openFindings.message: Rename the non-exempt hyphenated asset basename to lowercase snake_case and update its consumers.

detail.claim: The audited Markdown basename uses hyphens despite the sk-doc lowercase snake_case filename rule.
detail.reprobeEvidence: .opencode/skills/mcp-tooling/mcp-refero/assets/utcp-refero-manual.md:1 exists under the non-exempt hyphenated basename; .opencode/skills/sk-doc/shared/references/core_standards.md:37-51 retains the snake_case rule and its three exceptions.
detail.knownDeviationCheck: sk_doc_known_deviations.md legacy kebab-case entry applies to legacy filename references, not the audited artifact basename; no match.

openFindings.message: Registered-manual asset says discovery has not run and naming remains inferred after the dated fixture confirmed three live tools.

detail.claim: Discovery has NOT run yet and the callable name remains Inferred.
detail.reprobeEvidence: .opencode/skills/mcp-tooling/mcp-mobbin/references/discovery-fixture-2026-07-16.json:1 lists three discovered callable names and tool_info_first; the audited asset itself records completed discovery at lines 35 and 75.
detail.knownDeviationCheck: No reality-drift match exists in sk_doc_known_deviations.md.

openFindings.message: Wiring frontmatter and opening warning say discovery is pending and naming inferred despite the confirmed discovery section and fixture.

detail.claim: Discovery has NOT run and mobbin.mobbin_search_screens is predicted rather than observed.
detail.reprobeEvidence: .opencode/skills/mcp-tooling/mcp-mobbin/references/discovery-fixture-2026-07-16.json:1 lists the three observed names; mcp-wiring.md:103-110 calls them confirmed.
detail.knownDeviationCheck: No reality-drift match exists in sk_doc_known_deviations.md.

openFindings.message: Troubleshooting forbids deep as unresolved after the live schema confirmed it as a client-settable mode.

detail.claim: The deep input-vs-server-behavior conflict stays open.
detail.reprobeEvidence: .opencode/skills/mcp-tooling/mcp-mobbin/references/discovery-fixture-2026-07-16.json:1 tool_info_first declares mode?: "deep" | "standard" | "fast"; tool-surface.md:130 records the resolution.
detail.knownDeviationCheck: No reality-drift match exists in sk_doc_known_deviations.md.
